'''Madame Vesta''' was the headmistress of [[Alderaan Select Academy for Young Ladies]]. She was known for her strictness and was described as "a [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]] of a Nanny" by one of her students, [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]].<ref name="Diaries">{{Tales|11|The Princess Leia Diaries}}</ref>

{{Char-stub}}
